'''debh''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tree|tree]]". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tree|tree]]
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæbeheth|dæbeheth]] || [[word:dæbehej|dæbehej]] || [[word:dæbehesh|dæbehesh]] || [[word:dæbehe|dæbehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dabobohoth|dabobohoth]] || [[word:dabobohoj|dabobohoj]] || [[word:dabobohosh|dabobohosh]] || [[word:daboboho|daboboho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dabohoth|dabohoth]] || [[word:dabohoj|dabohoj]] || [[word:dabohosh|dabohosh]] || [[word:daboho|daboho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dabofhoth|dabofhoth]] || [[word:dabofhoj|dabofhoj]] || [[word:dabofhosh|dabofhosh]] || [[word:dabofhof|dabofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dabohotho|dabohotho]] || [[word:dabohojo|dabohojo]] || [[word:dabohosho|dabohosho]] || [[word:dabohoko|dabohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dabohoth|dabohoth]] || [[word:dabohoj|dabohoj]] || [[word:dabohosh|dabohosh]] || [[word:daboho|daboho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dabohothol|dabohothol]] || [[word:dabohojol|dabohojol]] || [[word:dabohoshol|dabohoshol]] || [[word:dabohokol|dabohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dabohothotho|dabohothotho]] || [[word:dabohojojo|dabohojojo]] || [[word:dabohoshosho|dabohoshosho]] || [[word:dabohoko|dabohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dabohothon|dabohothon]] || [[word:dabohojon|dabohojon]] || [[word:dabohoshon|dabohoshon]] || [[word:dabohokon|dabohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dabohothoro|dabohothoro]] || [[word:dabohojoro|dabohojoro]] || [[word:dabohoshoro|dabohoshoro]] || [[word:dabohokoro|dabohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
